title: Carbeth Plants 3 x Narcissus Tete a Tete Daffodil Bulbs in Pots - Potted Spring Plants - Mini Dwarf Yellow Daffodils - Indoor or Outdoor - Instant Colour Through The Winter Months
features: INSTANT COLOUR - These growing tete a tete bulbs will give instant impact in garden pots or garden borders
BRIGHT FLOWERS - Delightful miniature daffodils that will brighten even the dullest of spring days
EASY TO GROW - Undemanding and easy to grow, they are ideal for borders, rockeries and containers for a sunny windowsill; or grow them in bold drifts naturalised in grass
GOOD VALUE - Each pot contains 2 or 3 growing bulbs within it
description: Brighten your home or garden with the cheerful charm of Tête-à-Tête potted growing bulbs. These delightful miniature daffodils are known for their vibrant yellow blooms and early spring arrival, making them a perfect way to welcome the season. Arriving pre-potted and already sprouting, they’re ready to grow with no planting required—just place them in a sunny spot and watch them thrive. Tête-à-Tête daffodils are compact and charming, typically reaching 6 to 10 inches in height, making them ideal for indoor displays, patios, window boxes, or as a vibrant accent in your garden. They’re incredibly easy to care for, returning year after year with minimal maintenance. These early bloomers are often among the first flowers to emerge in late winter or early spring, offering a much-needed splash of color after the colder months.
